readSetId.description: The read set ID created for an uploaded read set.

reference.description: The store's genome reference. Required for all stores except TSV format with generic annotations.

storeFormat.description: The annotation file format of the store.

versionName.description: The name given to an annotation store version to distinguish it from other versions.

id.description: A generated ID for the annotation store

versionName.description: The name given to an annotation store version to distinguish it from other versions.

storeId.description: The ID for the annotation store from which new versions are being created.

versionOptions.description: The options for an annotation store version.

name.description: The name given to an annotation store version to distinguish it from other versions.

status.description: The status of a annotation store version.

creationTime.description: The time stamp for the creation of an annotation store version.

sequenceStoreId.description: The sequence store ID for the store that the read set will be created in.

uploadId.description: The ID for the initiated multipart upload.

sourceFileType.description: The file type of the read set source.

tags.description: The tags to add to the read set.

creationTime.description: The creation time of the multipart upload.

arn.description: Unique resource identifier for the run cache.

tags.description: The tags associated with this run cache.

sseConfig.description: Server-side encryption (SSE) settings for the store. This contains the KMS key ARN that is used to encrypt read set objects.

fallbackLocation.description: An S3 location that is used to store files that have failed a direct upload.

statusMessage.description: The status message of the sequence store.

propagatedSetLevelTags.description: The tags keys to propagate to the S3 objects associated with read sets in the sequence store.

s3Access.description: The S3 access metadata of the sequence store.

shareId.description: The ID that HealthOmics generates for the share.

uuid.description: The universally unique identifier (UUID) value for this workflow.
The universally unique identifier (UUID) value for this workflow version.

errors.description: Any errors that occur when attempting to delete an annotation store version.

status.description: The status of the share being deleted.

s3AccessPointArn.description: The S3 access point ARN that now has the access policy.

storeId.description: The Amazon Web Services-generated Sequence Store or Reference Store ID.

storeType.description: The type of store associated with the access point.

uuid.description: The universally unique identifier for a run.

storeFormat.description: The annotation file format of the store.

status.description: The status of an annotation store version.

name.description: The name of an annotation store.

versionName.description: The name of an annotation store version.

description.description: The description of an annotation store version.

creationTime.description: The time stamp for when an annotation store version was created.

updateTime.description: The time stamp for when an annotation store version was updated.

creationTime.description: The time when the store was created.

updateTime.description: The last-updated time of the Sequence Store.

propagatedSetLevelTags.description: The tags keys to propagate to the S3 objects associated with read sets in the sequence store.

statusMessage.description: The status message of the sequence store.

fallbackLocation.description: The S3 URI of a bucket and folder to store Read Sets that fail to upload.

s3Access.description: The S3 access metadata of the sequence store.

eTagAlgorithmFamily.description: The ETag algorithm family to use on ingested read sets.

checksum.description: An identifier used to confirm that parts are being added to the intended upload.
